entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The target crop species Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: KERNEL GRADE
entities.description: A key market trait influencing price and proportional to pod yield.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The total yield of pods produced by the plant.

entities.name: MAGIC LINES
entities.description: Multi-parent advanced generation inter-cross lines used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: P-REP DESIGN
entities.description: Partially replicated design used for assessing traits across seasons.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The first season of assessment (2021-22).

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The second season of assessment (2021-22).

entities.name: GWAS
entities.description: Genome-wide association study used to identify marker-trait associations.

entities.name: MTAS
entities.description: Marker-trait associations identified through GWAS.

entities.name: PNR_I
entities.description: Percent net recovery of grade-I kernel.

entities.name: CPO_I
entities.description: Counts per ounce of grade-I kernel.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms associated with traits.

entities.description: A specific SNP associated with PNR_I and CPO_I.
